mapper.sql: a . id ,a.created_by, a.created_time, a.updated_by, a.updated_time, a.redirect, a.app_key, a.app_secret, a.name, a.version, a.type, a.introduce, a.remark, a.url, a.is_visible, a.sort_value
mapper.select:
SELECT
from def_application a left join def_tenant_application_rel ta on a.id = ta.application_id where ta.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

select DISTINCT tar.application_id from def_tenant_application_rel tar INNER JOIN def_user_tenant_rel utr on tar.tenant_id = utr.tenant_id where utr.id = #{employeeId} and (tar.expiration_time >= #{now} or tar.expiration_time is null)
